sanskrit: सत्कारमानपूजार्थं तपो दम्भेन चैव यत् | क्रियते तदिह प्रोक्तं राजसं चलमध्रुवम् ||
transliteration: satkāra-māna-pūjārthaṃ tapo dambhena caiva yat kriyate tad iha proktaṃ rājasaṃ calam adhruvam
literal_meaning: Austerity performed for the sake of respect, honor, and worship, and also with pride, is declared here to be of the nature of rajas, unsteady and impermanent.
contextual_meaning: Spiritual practices done to feed the ego’s hunger for status are emotionally unstable and ultimately hollow.
psychological_state: Narcissistic defense against core inadequacy; the persona is grand but the self-esteem is brittle.
trigger_scenario: Posting yoga poses on social media mainly for likes and brand deals, then feeling drained when the algorithm changes.
anchor_text: Practice quietly; let the work, not the applause, define you.
